arts.ttl: What to expect from new Leicester boss Van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Those who know Ruud van Nistelrooy say the former striker is "driven", "strong-willed" and "full of self-belief".

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Brentford as Coady and Thomas among four changes in new formation
arts.sum: City (5-4-1): Hermansen; Justin, Faes, Coady, Okoli, Thomas; Buonanotte, Ndidi, Soumare, Ayew; Vardy. It looks like it will be a 5-4-1 formation with Buonanotte on the right and Ayew on the left, with Wilfred Ndidi and Boubakary Soumare in the middle.

arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy takes over from Steve Cooper...

arts.ttl: Leicester scouting in-demand 26-G/A star ahead of potential move
arts.sum: Leicester City have recently appointed Ruud van Nistelrooy as their new manager and the former Manchester United striker will look to get their season back on track. After a disappointing start to the season, Steve Cooper was shown the door and the 48-year-old has been appointed as his replacement. The Dutch manager returned to English […] The post Leicester scouting in-demand 26-G/A star ahead of potential move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Suggestion Van Nistelrooy has taken Leicester job for sake of it – Just wanted in to Premier League
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy may have taken the Leicester City job just to get his foot into the Premier League door. That’s at least according to Valentijn Driessen, via Voetbal Primeur, who believes the Dutch coach faces a very difficult first experience as a manager in England’s top flight. arts.ttl: Why Ruud van Nistelrooy is NOT managing Leicester vs Brentford after Man Utd U-turn
arts.sum: New Leicester City manager Ruud van Nistelrooy will be watching on as interim Ben Dawson takes charge against Brentford in the Premier League after agreeing to join the Foxes

arts.ttl: Basara Mainz: Why a former Leicester City star is running a Japanese club in the heart of Germany
